creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 208140
Diff from 0.1.17 to 0.1.18

Update the rosinstall_generator port to 0.1.18.

The upstream project doesn't have a changelog for this. But it is possible to look at the commits in GitHub:

https://github.com/ros-infrastructure/rosinstall_generator/commits/0.1.18

The main changes seems to be to fix the ALL command and update the distribution lists.
